title: stelis trifoliacea
intro: Stelis trifoliacea, also known as the Throatwort, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and sore throats due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stelis trifoliacea include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, making it a popular herbal remedy for coughs, colds, and bronchitis. Stelis trifoliacea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
